description: 30 cases covering skills and workflows not tested by the official BioAgentBench or the 32-case extended benchmark suite. Compatible with run_extended_scientific_benchmark_suite.py.

cases.description: ChIP-seq peak calling with MACS2 on synthetic enriched regions.
cases.prompt: Call ChIP-seq peaks from the treatment reads at {data_root}/treatment.fastq using the input control at {data_root}/input_control.fastq and reference {data_root}/reference.fa. Align reads first with bwa-mem2, then call peaks with macs2_chipseq_callpeak. Write peaks to {selected_dir}/peaks/.

cases.description: ATAC-seq accessible chromatin peak calling with MACS2.
cases.prompt: Call accessible chromatin regions from the ATAC-seq paired-end reads at {data_root}/atac_R1.fastq and {data_root}/atac_R2.fastq using the reference at {data_root}/reference.fa. Align with bwa-mem2, then call peaks with macs2_atacseq_callpeak using ATAC-seq-appropriate settings. Write peaks to {selected_dir}/atac_peaks/.

cases.description: Bisulfite methylation analysis on E. coli 10K reads.
cases.prompt: Perform bisulfite methylation analysis on the paired-end reads at {data_root}/Ecoli_10K_methylated_R1.fastq.gz and {data_root}/Ecoli_10K_methylated_R2.fastq.gz against the E. coli reference at {data_root}/ecoli_ref.fa. Use methylation_bismark_style and write results to {selected_dir}/methylation/.

cases.description: Copy number variation detection with CNVkit on synthetic exome data.
cases.prompt: Run copy number analysis. Align the tumor reads at {data_root}/tumor.fastq and normal reads at {data_root}/normal.fastq to reference {data_root}/reference.fa using bwa-mem2. Then detect copy number variations with cnv_cnvkit_style using the target regions at {data_root}/targets.bed. Write results to {selected_dir}/cnv/.

cases.description: Gene fusion detection with STAR-Fusion style on synthetic RNA-seq.
cases.prompt: Detect gene fusions from the RNA-seq reads at {data_root}/rnaseq_1.fastq.gz and {data_root}/rnaseq_2.fastq.gz using the reference at {data_root}/reference.fa and annotation {data_root}/annotation.gtf. Use fusion_star_fusion_style and write results to {selected_dir}/fusions/.

cases.description: T cell receptor repertoire profiling with MiXCR style.
cases.prompt: Profile the T cell receptor repertoire from the sequencing reads at {data_root}/tcr_reads_R1.fastq.gz and {data_root}/tcr_reads_R2.fastq.gz. Use immune_repertoire_mixcr_style and write results to {selected_dir}/tcr/.

cases.description: De novo bacterial genome assembly with SPAdes on E. coli reads.
cases.prompt: Assemble the bacterial genome from paired-end reads at {data_root}/reads_R1.fastq.gz and {data_root}/reads_R2.fastq.gz using spades_assemble. Write the assembly to {selected_dir}/assembly/.

cases.description: De novo transcriptome assembly with Trinity on synthetic reads.
cases.prompt: Assemble a de novo transcriptome from the RNA-seq reads at {data_root}/reads.left.fq.gz and {data_root}/reads.right.fq.gz using trinity_assemble. Write results to {selected_dir}/trinity_out/.

cases.description: Long-read assembly-to-assembly alignment with minimap2 (human vs orangutan mt).
cases.prompt: Align the orangutan mitochondrial genome at {data_root}/MT-orang.fa to the human mitochondrial reference at {data_root}/MT-human.fa using minimap2_align with preset asm5 (assembly-to-assembly). Write the aligned output to {selected_dir}/aligned/orang_vs_human.sam.

cases.description: Somatic variant calling with GATK Mutect2 on synthetic tumor/normal pair.
cases.prompt: Call somatic variants. Align the tumor reads at {data_root}/tumor_R1.fastq and {data_root}/tumor_R2.fastq and the normal reads at {data_root}/normal_R1.fastq and {data_root}/normal_R2.fastq to the reference at {data_root}/ref_genome.fa using bwa-mem2. Then call somatic variants with gatk_mutect2_call. Write the somatic VCF to {selected_dir}/somatic/somatic_variants.vcf.

cases.description: Structural variant calling with Sniffles on synthetic long reads (known DEL + INS).
cases.prompt: Detect structural variants from the long reads at {data_root}/sample_reads.fastq using the reference at {data_root}/ref_small.fa. Align with minimap2_align using map-ont preset, then call SVs with sniffles_sv_call. Write the SV VCF to {selected_dir}/sv/structural_variants.vcf.

cases.description: Protein domain annotation with HMMER hmmscan on E. coli proteins.
cases.prompt: Annotate protein domains for the sequences in {data_root}/query_proteins.faa against the Pfam database. Use hmmscan_search and write results to {selected_dir}/domains/hmmscan_results.tbl.

cases.description: BLAST protein homology search: makeblastdb + blastp (E. coli vs Salmonella).
cases.prompt: Search for protein homologs. First build a BLAST database from {data_root}/swissprot_subset.faa with makeblastdb_run (protein type). Then search the query proteins at {data_root}/query_proteins.faa against it with blastp_search using outfmt 6. Write results to {selected_dir}/blast/blastp_results.tsv.

cases.description: Prokaryotic gene prediction with Prodigal on full E. coli K-12 genome.
cases.prompt: Predict protein-coding genes in the bacterial genome at {data_root}/ecoli_k12.fasta using prodigal_annotate. Write predicted genes to {selected_dir}/annotation/.

cases.description: Full genome annotation with Prokka on E. coli contigs.
cases.prompt: Annotate the bacterial genome assembly at {data_root}/contigs.fasta using prokka_annotate. Write annotation files to {selected_dir}/prokka_out/.

cases.description: Adapter/quality trimming with fastp on real E. coli reads.
cases.prompt: Trim adapters and low-quality bases from the reads at {data_root}/reads_R1.fastq.gz and {data_root}/reads_R2.fastq.gz using fastp_run. Write trimmed reads and QC report to {selected_dir}/trimmed/.

cases.description: Adapter trimming with cutadapt using explicit TruSeq adapter sequence.
cases.prompt: Trim Illumina TruSeq adapters from {data_root}/reads_R1.fastq.gz and {data_root}/reads_R2.fastq.gz using cutadapt_run with adapter sequence AGATCGGAAGAGC. Write trimmed reads to {selected_dir}/cutadapt_out/.

cases.description: Read quality control with FastQC on real E. coli reads.
cases.prompt: Run quality control on {data_root}/reads_R1.fastq.gz using fastqc_run. Write the report to {selected_dir}/qc/.

cases.description: Full RNA-seq pipeline: STAR alignment + featureCounts + DESeq2 on C. parapsilosis.
cases.prompt: Perform RNA-seq differential expression starting from raw reads. Align the biofilm samples (SRR1278968, SRR1278969, SRR1278970) and planktonic samples (SRR1278971, SRR1278972, SRR1278973) from {data_root}/ to a reference genome. Use STAR for alignment, featureCounts for counting, and DESeq2 for differential expression. Write final DE results to {selected_dir}/rnaseq_full/deseq_results.csv.

cases.description: Full RNA-seq pipeline: STAR + featureCounts + edgeR on C. parapsilosis.
cases.prompt: Perform RNA-seq DE using STAR alignment, featureCounts, and edgeR on the C. parapsilosis samples in {data_root}/. Biofilm samples: SRR1278968-SRR1278970. Planktonic: SRR1278971-SRR1278973. Write edgeR results to {selected_dir}/star_edger/edger_results.csv.

cases.description: Transcript quantification with Salmon directly from FASTQ reads.
cases.prompt: Quantify transcript expression from the paired-end reads at {data_root}/reads_R1.fastq.gz and {data_root}/reads_R2.fastq.gz using the transcriptome reference at {data_root}/transcriptome.fa. Use salmon_quant and write results to {selected_dir}/salmon_out/.

cases.description: Transcript quantification with Kallisto from FASTQ reads.
cases.prompt: Quantify transcript expression using kallisto_quant on {data_root}/reads_R1.fastq.gz and {data_root}/reads_R2.fastq.gz with the transcriptome at {data_root}/transcriptome.fa. Write results to {selected_dir}/kallisto_out/.

cases.description: Germline variant calling pipeline: BWA-MEM2 + GATK HaplotypeCaller on GIAB data.
cases.prompt: Call germline variants from the reads at {data_root}/sample_R1.fastq and {data_root}/sample_R2.fastq. Align with bwa_mem_align to reference {data_root}/ref_genome.fa, then call variants with gatk_haplotypecaller. Write VCF to {selected_dir}/exome/variants.vcf.

cases.description: Germline variant calling with FreeBayes as alternative to GATK.
cases.prompt: Call germline variants using FreeBayes. Align reads at {data_root}/sample_R1.fastq and {data_root}/sample_R2.fastq to reference {data_root}/ref_genome.fa with bwa_mem_align, then call variants with freebayes_call. Write VCF to {selected_dir}/freebayes/variants.vcf.

cases.description: Comprehensive BAM statistics with three samtools tools on HNRNPC chr14 data.
cases.prompt: Generate comprehensive alignment statistics for the BAM at {data_root}/ERR127302_chr14.bam. Run samtools_flagstat, samtools_idxstats, and samtools_stats. Write all reports to {selected_dir}/bam_stats/.

cases.description: Single-cell analysis from raw synthetic 10X FASTQs (not pre-processed h5ad).
cases.prompt: Perform single-cell analysis from raw 10X FASTQs at {data_root}/sample_R1.fastq.gz and {data_root}/sample_R2.fastq.gz using the genome at {data_root}/genome.fa and annotation {data_root}/genes.gtf. Use sc_count_and_cluster and write results to {selected_dir}/sc_raw/.

cases.description: Seurat-based single-cell workflow (alternative to Scanpy) on PBMC3k.
cases.prompt: Analyze the single-cell dataset using Seurat. Process the data at {data_root}/pbmc3k_processed.h5ad using seurat_rscript_workflow. Write results to {selected_dir}/seurat_out/.

cases.description: Alternative splicing analysis with rMATS on HNRNPC chr14 BAMs.
cases.prompt: Detect alternative splicing events between treatment and control groups. Treatment BAMs: {data_root}/treatment_rep1.bam,{data_root}/treatment_rep2.bam. Control BAMs: {data_root}/control_rep1.bam,{data_root}/control_rep2.bam. Use rmats_run with annotation GTF at {data_root}/annotation.gtf and read length 50. Write results to {selected_dir}/splicing/.

cases.description: Exon-level differential usage analysis with DEXSeq on synthetic exon counts.
cases.prompt: Perform exon-level differential usage analysis on the exon count matrix at {data_root}/exon_counts.tsv with metadata at {data_root}/metadata.tsv using dexseq_run. Write results to {selected_dir}/dexseq/.

cases.description: Genomic interval analysis: bedtools intersect + coverage on synthetic BED files.
cases.prompt: Find which ChIP-seq peaks overlap gene promoters. Intersect the peaks at {data_root}/ctcf_peaks.bed with the promoter regions at {data_root}/promoters_chr14.bed using bedtools_intersect. Then compute coverage depth with bedtools_coverage using the peaks over the promoters. Write results to {selected_dir}/intervals/.
